GenAiFunction.description: This action helps you explore Data Cloud entities, their fields, and relationships. Use the "summary" scope to discover available entities, "details" with an entityName to see fields, primary keys, and relationships, and "relationships" with an entityName to see only how that entity connects to others (useful for planning JOINs). Always use "summary" first to find the correct entity name. Data Cloud entity names have suffixes: __dlm (Data Model Objects), __dll (Data Lake Objects), __cio (Calculated Insights).
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: My Org Butler: Explore Data Cloud
